default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod meeting to discuss updates and priorities across client accounts (Augment, Webflow, Surge)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment: Pausing content production for 1 week to refine workflows, clean up existing content, and launch Augie CLI](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Webflow: Integration pages progressing well; SEO articles paused after initial 5 for monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Surge: Developing "Art of Post-Training" content series; aiming for high-quality, Hacker News-style articles](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

## Topics

### Augment Content Strategy

  - [Pausing 30 articles/week production for 1 week (week after next) to:](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [Refine workflows for better content quality](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Clean up/consolidate existing content](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [Launch Augie CLI (100+ workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Experimenting with refreshing existing high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Restructuring blog: new subpaths (/learn, /tools, etc.) with 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Dev team working on blog optimizations (categories, CTAs, table of contents)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)

### Webflow Updates

  - [Integration pages progressing smoothly](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Stopped working with Neural due to slow delivery; agentic pipeline performing well](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [SEO articles: Pausing after initial 5 for performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Use case guides: Updating artifacts based on Vic's feedback, generating new sample for review](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [QBR deck preparation underway (Liz and Sydney)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

### Surge Content Strategy

  - [Developing "Art of Post-Training" series](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Aiming for high-quality, Hacker News-style content](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Focus on creating 1-2 excellent articles to prove capability](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

### Development Updates

  - [Augment Code Library ready; waiting for content and Augie CLI integration](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Augment blog optimizations in progress (table of contents, CTAs, categories)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)

### Client Relationship Management

  - [Augment: Sil more involved in content process; company shifting towards enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [Webflow: Healthy relationship; multiple expansion opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [Surge: Challenges persist; team focusing on delivering high-impact projects to rebuild trust](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Augment: Implement 1-week pause in content production; refine workflows](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Webflow: Complete QBR deck; continue use case guide iterations](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Surge: Develop initial "Art of Post-Training" content; focus on quality](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Dev: Complete Augment blog optimizations; prepare for Augie CLI launch](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Team: Add prompts to Crunch; map published URLs in Looker Studio (where applicable)](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [Jason: Source technical writer/developer for content quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/np_5xcGU39HMnw22T3xLSTczxz3vcyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

Send over current SEO articles to Webflow team; confirm pause on production next week

Start working on Webflow QBR deck with Sydney; prepare for Wednesday presentation

Map all published Augment articles; refresh/add new prompts in Crunch
